candidates.row_label: Premium revenue ceded to reinsurers on insurance contracts issued
candidates.why: This is ceded/reinsurance-related revenue, not the primary top-line.
Best match for insurer top-line revenue from core operations.
Broad total including investment/other income; useful as fallback if reporting changed.

variables.notes: For an insurer, 'Insurance Revenue' is the preferred core top-line. 'Total Revenue' is included as a fallback priority in case the reporting line changes across years.

No candidate list was provided, and insurer statements do not present a standard industrial COGS line. 'Insurance Service Expenses' appears to be the closest direct operating cost line for 2022-2025. Manual review is needed because 2021 appears to use older insurance-format rows such as 'Claims Incurred', so comparability across years is uncertain.

candidates.why: Could be an SG&A component, but preview shows no populated values and it is only one possible component.
Balance sheet line, not an income statement operating expense.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the likely overhead expense rows. Selected income-statement overhead components and excluded D&A. Manual review is required because insurer expense presentation is mixed and 'Other expenses' may include some non-SG&A items in certain years. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other expenses, [Income Statement] Staff costs, [Income Statement] salaries and Other staff Costs
No R&D expense line is visible on the provided statements.

candidates.why: Best available broad finance-cost line and likely contains interest expense when no cleaner interest line exists.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest line, but only for lease liabilities and therefore too narrow as primary choice.
Semantically relevant but appears unpopulated in preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Not present exactly in the preview, so should not be used.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest - Balancing value
candidates.why: Contains 'Balancing value', so less preferred than a reported finance expense line.
Balancing row, not a preferred reported line item.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Using a priority list as requested. Prefer 'Finance expenses' as the broad reported finance-cost line; lease-interest and 'Finance Costs' are fallbacks if the main line is missing in some years.

candidates.why: Income statement impairment row, not book equity.
Income statement gain/loss row, not equity.
Income statement gain/loss row, not equity.
Equity component only, not full book equity.
Equity component only, not full book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Best match because it excludes non-controlling interests and represents parent shareholders' equity.
Broad total equity including NCI; only fallback if owner/parent equity were unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity first to avoid double counting with MIB. 'Total equity' is included only as a fallback if the owner-equity line is unavailable in some years.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Best balance sheet line for minority/non-controlling interest.
Equivalent balance sheet label and useful fallback.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Non-controlling interests - Total
candidates.why: Income statement OCI attribution, not minority equity on balance sheet.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI lines only, with 'Non-controlling interests' preferred and 'Minority Interest' as fallback.
